## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include secrets, wallet data, personal paths, or unredacted diagnostics.
- [ ] I kept hosted code static and the companion loopback-only.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for changed behavior.
- [ ] I ran `pnpm check:no-secrets` and the relevant local verification gates.
- [ ] I did not imply official Dusk affiliation or unsupported production readiness.
